brand_focus: Daily reposts of the best FRESH GTA V and VALORANT clips (with creator credit). Western/English-first audience; running a geo A/B (Western vs Asian-language source clips) to learn which converts. Optimize for reach and shares.
caption_strategy: Lead with a curiosity/hype hook that makes a non-follower stop. Name the game plainly for search. Keep it 1-2 short lines. Always credit the streamer/clipper. End with the follow CTA. No generic mega-tags.
hashtag_strategy: 4-5 niche tags matching the game (e.g. #gtarp #gta6 #nopixel for GTA; #valorant #valorantclips for VALORANT). Vary two per post. Avoid #gaming/#viral mega-tags.
learnings: Fresh account revival (Direction A). Prior run: 332K reach on reposts but ~0 follows (reach-without-identity). This cycle: consistency (never go dark), tight GTA+VALORANT niche, Western-first with a 2x/week Asian-source A/B probe. Watch follows_per_reach and shares_per_reach by region+game; retire the weaker region/game once signal is clear.
